name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES state

(* State of each process: idle, trying, critical *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

(* Transition: a process can move from idle to trying,
   from trying to critical if no other is critical,
   from critical to idle *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>> (* no other variable changes *)

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
           /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes

(* State of the coordinator: "init", "preparing", "committing", "aborting", "finished" *)
(* Votes: mapping from participant to "yes" or "no" *)

Init == 
  /\ state = "init"
  /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "unknown"]

PrepareMsg(p) == 
  /\ state = "init"
  /\ state' = "preparing"
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteMsg(p, v) == 
  /\ state = "preparing"
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
  /\ IF v = "no" THEN state' = "aborting" ELSE UNCHANGED state

CommitMsg == 
  /\ state = "preparing"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : votes[p] = "yes"
  /\ state' = "committing"
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

AbortMsg == 
  /\ state = "preparing"
  /\ state' = "aborting"
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

FinishMsg == 
  /\ state \in {"committing", "aborting"}
  /\ state' = "finished"
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

Next == 
  \E p \in Participants : 
    PrepareMsg(p) \/ VoteMsg(p, "yes") \/ VoteMsg(p, "no")
  \/ CommitMsg
  \/ AbortMsg
  \/ FinishMsg

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in {"init", "preparing", "committing", "aborting", "finished"}
  /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"yes", "no", "unknown"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == states[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ forks[i] = i
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ forks[i] = i
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

HungryAction(i) == 
  /\ Thinking(i)
  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

EatAction(i) == 
  /\ Hungry(i)
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ TakeForks(i)

FinishEating(i) == 
  /\ Eating(i)
  /\ PutForks(i)

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ HungryAction(i)
    \/ EatAction(i)
    \/ FinishEating(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ LET maxNum = Max( [j \in 1..N |-> IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0] )
             IN num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 0..K-1, count is integer 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(K)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ count \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ count = 0

(* Producer action: enqueues an element if queue not full *)
Enqueue(x) == 
    /\ count < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
    /\ count' = count + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeues an element if queue not empty *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ count > 0
    /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
    /\ count' = count - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next state: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \/ \E x \in 0..K-1: Enqueue(x)
    \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, ServerSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Leader == "Leader"
Candidate == "Candidate"
Follower == "Follower"

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerSet |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in ServerSet |-> Follower]

Next ==
    \/ \E s \in ServerSet :
        /\ state[s] = Follower
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = Candidate]
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    \/ \E s \in ServerSet :
        /\ state[s] = Candidate
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = Leader]
    \/ \E s \in ServerSet :
        /\ state[s] = Follower
        /\ state' = state
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ ReadAcquire
  \/ ReadRelease
  \/ WriteAcquire
  \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, M \in Nat \ {0}, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, hasn
ACCEPTOR_STATE == [ ballot : Nat, value : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN ]

(* Types of proposer states *)
PROPOSER_STATE == [ ballot : Nat, value : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN ]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0, chosen |-> FALSE]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0, chosen |-> FALSE]]
  /\ chosen = 0

(* Proposer sends Prepare to all acceptors *)
Prepare(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].chosen = FALSE
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![j] = [proposers[j] EXCEPT !.ballot = proposers[j].ballot + 1]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

(* Acceptor responds to Prepare *)
Promise(i, j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].chosen = FALSE
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.ballot = proposers[j].ballot]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

(* Proposer sends Accept to all acceptors *)
Accept(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].chosen = FALSE
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![j] = [proposers[j] EXCEPT !.value = proposers[j].value]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

(* Acceptor responds to Accept *)
Accepted(i, j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].chosen = FALSE
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.value = proposers[j].value]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

(* Acceptor chooses value if it hasn't yet *)
Choose(i) ==
  /\ acceptors[i].chosen = FALSE
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.chosen = TRUE]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

(* Proposer learns chosen value *)
Learn(j) ==
  /\ proposers[j].chosen = FALSE
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![j] = [proposers[j] EXCEPT !.chosen = TRUE]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M : Promise(i, j)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Accept(j)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M : Accepted(i, j)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : Choose(i)
  \/ \E j \in 1..M : Learn(j)

(* Invariant: once chosen, value never changes *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> ACCEPTOR_STATE]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> PROPOSER_STATE]
  /\ chosen \in Nat
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].chosen => acceptors[i].value = chosen
  /\ \A j \in 1..M : proposers[j].chosen => proposers[j].value = chosen

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE
VARIABLES chunks, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = SplitFile(file, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = 0

Next == 
    /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, Head(chunks))
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ retransmit_count' = 0
    \/ /\ retransmit_count < MAX_RETRIES
       /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmit_count \in Nat
    /\ Len(chunks) + Len(sent_chunks) = Len(file)

SplitFile(f, sz) == 
    IF Len(f) <= sz THEN <<f>> ELSE <<SubSeq(f, 1, sz)>> \o SplitFile(SubSeq(f, sz+1, Len(f)), sz)

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES data, activeTx, nextTxId, t



TypeOK == /\ data \in Seq[Record]
          /\ activeTx \in Seq[TxRecord]
          /\ nextTxId \in Nat

Init == /\ data = <<>>
        /\ activeTx = <<>>
        /\ nextTxId = 1

StartTx == 
  /\ activeTx' = Append(activeTx, [id |-> nextTxId, state |-> "begin", writes |-> <<>>])
  /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
  /\ data' = data

AbortTx(tid) ==
  /\ activeTx' = Filter(activeTx, t |-> t.id # tid)
  /\ data' = data

CommitTx(tid) ==
  /\ LET t = CHOOSE t \in activeTx : t.id = tid
     IN /\ activeTx' = Filter(activeTx, t' |-> t'.id # tid)
        /\ data' = Append(data, t.writes)

Next == StartTx \/ AbortTx(tid) \/ CommitTx(tid)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, activeTx, nextTxId>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn \in 1..2

Next == \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>
      \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = {}

Next == 
  /\ known' = known
  /\ infected' = infected \cup {i \in 1..N : 
        /\ i \in infected
        /\ \E j \in 1..N : j \notin infected /\ j \in known /\ j \notin infected' /\ j \in infected' }

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client

Pages == 1..N

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE free, allocated

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ free \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq free

(* Initial state: all pages are free, no client has any page *)
Init == 
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] = {}

(* Allocate a page to a client *)
Allocate(c, p) == 
    /\ c \in Client
    /\ p \in free
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \union {p}]
    /\ free' = free \ {p}

(* Release a page from a client *)
Release(c, p) == 
    /\ c \in Client
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}

(* Next-state relation: either allocate or release *)
Next == 
    \E c \in Client : \E p \in Pages : Allocate(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
    \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants
    \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
    \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
    \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NodeSet

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [NodeSet -> [NodeSet -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in NodeSet: counts[n] \in [NodeSet -> Nat]

Init == /\ counts = [n \in NodeSet |-> [m \in NodeSet |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in NodeSet:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in NodeSet |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
